description: Terminal-Bench task `hello-world` ported as a code-execution scenario. The agent must create hello.txt containing 'Hello, world!'; success is decided by the task's OWN pytest suite (vendored from terminal-bench).
system_prompt: You are a build agent working inside a project directory. Use your tools (bash, write_file) to actually do the work — do not just describe it. When the task is complete, briefly report what you did.
user_prompt: Create a file called hello.txt in the current working directory. Write "Hello, world!" to it.

expected_outcome.instruction_original: Create a file called /app/hello.txt. Write "Hello, world!" to it.
expected_outcome.note: Host-only port: the upstream /app path is rewritten to the per-run workspace via TBENCH_WORKDIR; nothing else changed.
